netapp.cloudmanager.na_cloudmanager_aggr.description: Create, Modify or Delete Aggregate on Cloud Manager.

state.description: Whether the specified aggregate should exist or not.

name.description: The name of the new aggregate.

working_environment_name.description: The working environment name where the aggregate will be created.

working_environment_id.description: The public ID of the working environment where the aggregate will be created.

client_id.description: The connector ID of the Cloud Manager Connector.

number_of_disks.description: The required number of disks in the new aggregate.

disk_size_size.description: The required size of the disks.

disk_size_unit.description: The disk size unit ['GB' or 'TB']. The default is 'TB'.

home_node.description: The home node that the new aggregate should belong to.

capacity_tier.description: The aggregate's capacity tier for tiering cold data to object storage. If the value is NONE, the capacity_tier will not be set on aggregate creation.

iops.description: Provisioned IOPS. Needed only when providerVolumeType is "io1".

throughput.description: Unit is Mb/s. Valid range 125-1000. Required only when provider_volume_type is 'gp3'.

netapp.cloudmanager.na_cloudmanager_aws_.short_description: Cloud ONTAP file system(FSx) in AWS
netapp.cloudmanager.na_cloudmanager_aws_.description: Create or delete CVO/Working Environment for AWS FSx.

state.description: Whether the specified FSx in AWS should exist or not.

name.description: The name of the CVO/Working Environment for AWS FSx to manage.

region.description: The region where the working environment will be created.

aws_credentials_name.description: The name of the AWS Credentials account name.

workspace_id.description: The ID of the Cloud Manager workspace of working environment.

tenant_id.description: The NetApp account ID that the File System will be associated with.

working_environment_id.description: The ID of the AWS FSx working environment used for delete.

storage_capacity_size.description: volume size for the first data aggregate. For GB, the value can be [100 or 500]. For TB, the value can be [1,2,4,8,16].

fsx_admin_password.description: The admin password for Cloud Volumes ONTAP fsxadmin user.

security_group_ids.description: The IDs of the security groups for the working environment, multiple security groups can be provided separated by ','.

kms_key_id.description: AWS encryption parameters. It is required if using aws encryption.

tags.description: Additional tags for the FSx AWS working environment.

primary_subnet_id.description: The subnet ID of the first node.

secondary_subnet_id.description: The subnet ID of the second node.

route_table_ids.description: The list of route table IDs that will be updated with the floating IPs.

import_file_system.description: bool option to existing import AWS file system to CloudManager.

file_system_id.description: The AWS file system ID to import to CloudManager. Required when import_file_system is 'True'

netapp.cloudmanager.na_cloudmanager_cifs.description: Create or Delete a CIFS server on the Cloud Volume ONTAP system to support CIFS volumes, based on an Active Directory or Workgroup.

state.description: Whether the specified cifs server should exist or not.

working_environment_name.description: The working environment name where the cifs server will be created.

working_environment_id.description: The public ID of the working environment where the cifs server will be created.

client_id.description: The connector ID of the Cloud Manager Connector.

domain.description: The active directory domain name. For CIFS AD only.

dns_domain.description: The DNS domain name. For CIFS AD only.

username.description: The active directory admin user name. For CIFS AD only.

password.description: The active directory admin password. For CIFS AD only.

ip_addresses.description: The DNS server IP addresses. For CIFS AD only.

netbios.description: The CIFS server NetBIOS name. For CIFS AD only.

organizational_unit.description: The organizational unit in which to register the CIFS server. For CIFS AD only.

is_workgroup.description: For CIFS workgroup operations, set to true.

server_name.description: The server name. For CIFS workgroup only.

workgroup_name.description: The workgroup name. For CIFS workgroup only.

netapp.cloudmanager.na_cloudmanager_conn.short_description: NetApp Cloud Manager connector for AWS
netapp.cloudmanager.na_cloudmanager_conn.description: Create or delete Cloud Manager connector for AWS. This module requires to be authenticated with AWS.  This can be done with C(aws configure).

state.description: Whether the specified Cloud Manager connector for AWS should exist or not.

name.description: The name of the Cloud Manager connector for AWS to manage.

instance_type.description: The type of instance (for example, t3.xlarge). At least 4 CPU and 16 GB of memory are required.

key_name.description: The name of the key pair to use for the Connector instance.

subnet_id.description: The ID of the subnet for the instance.

region.description: The region where the Cloud Manager Connector will be created.

instance_id.description: The ID of the EC2 instance used for delete.

client_id.description: The unique client ID of the Connector. The connector ID.

company.description: The name of the company of the user.

security_group_ids.description: The IDs of the security groups for the instance, multiple security groups can be provided separated by ','.

iam_instance_profile_name.description: The name of the instance profile for the Connector.

enable_termination_protection.description: Indicates whether to enable termination protection on the instance.

associate_public_ip_address.description: Indicates whether to associate a public IP address to the instance. If not provided, the association will be done based on the subnet's configuration.

proxy_url.description: The proxy URL, if using a proxy to connect to the internet.

proxy_user_name.description: The proxy user name, if using a proxy to connect to the internet.

proxy_password.description: The proxy password, if using a proxy to connect to the internet.

proxy_certificates.description: The proxy certificates, a list of certificate file names.

aws_tag.description: Additional tags for the AWS EC2 instance.

netapp.cloudmanager.na_cloudmanager_conn.short_description: NetApp Cloud Manager connector for Azure.
netapp.cloudmanager.na_cloudmanager_conn.description: Create or delete Cloud Manager connector for Azure.

state.description: Whether the specified Cloud Manager connector for Azure should exist or not.

name.description: The name of the Cloud Manager connector for Azure to manage.

virtual_machine_size.description: The virtual machine type. (for example, Standard_DS3_v2). At least 4 CPU and 16 GB of memory are required.

resource_group.description: The resource group in Azure where the resources will be created.

subnet_name.description: The name of the subnet for the virtual machine. For example, in /subscriptions/xxx/resourceGroups/xxx/providers/Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/xxx/subnets/default, only default is needed.

location.description: The location where the Cloud Manager Connector will be created.

client_id.description: The unique client ID of the Connector. The connector ID.

subscription_id.description: The ID of the Azure subscription.

company.description: The name of the company of the user.

vnet_name.description: The name of the virtual network. for example, in /subscriptions/xxx/resourceGroups/xxx/providers/Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/default, only default is needed.

vnet_resource_group.description: The resource group in Azure associated with the virtual network. If not provided, its assumed that the VNet is within the previously specified resource group.

network_security_resource_group.description: The resource group in Azure associated with the security group. If not provided, its assumed that the security group is within the previously specified resource group.

network_security_group_name.description: The name of the security group for the deployment.

proxy_certificates.description: The proxy certificates, a list of certificate file names.

associate_public_ip_address.description: Indicates whether to associate the public IP address to the virtual machine.

proxy_url.description: The proxy URL, if using a proxy to connect to the internet.

proxy_user_name.description: The proxy user name, if using a proxy to connect to the internet.

proxy_password.description: The proxy password, if using a proxy to connect to the internet.

admin_username.description: The user name for the Connector.

storage_account.description: The storage account can be created automatically. When C(storage_account) is not set, the name is constructed by appending 'sa' to the connector C(name). Storage account name must be between 3 and 24 characters in length and use numbers and lower-case letters only.

netapp.cloudmanager.na_cloudmanager_conn.short_description: NetApp Cloud Manager connector for GCP.
netapp.cloudmanager.na_cloudmanager_conn.description: Create or delete Cloud Manager connector for GCP.

state.description: Whether the specified Cloud Manager connector for GCP should exist or not.

name.description: The name of the Cloud Manager connector for GCP to manage.

project_id.description: The GCP project_id where the connector will be created.

zone.description: The GCP zone where the Connector will be created.

gcp_service_account_email.description: The email of the service_account for the connector instance. This service account is used to allow the Connector to create Cloud Volume ONTAP.

company.description: The name of the company of the user.

gcp_service_account_path.description: The local path of the service_account JSON file for GCP authorization purposes. This service account is used to create the Connector in GCP.

subnet_id.description: The name of the subnet for the virtual machine.

network_project_id.description: The project id in GCP associated with the Subnet. If not provided, it is assumed that the Subnet is within the previously specified project id.

machine_type.description: The machine_type for the Connector VM.

firewall_tags.description: Indicates whether to add firewall_tags to the connector VM (HTTP and HTTP).

associate_public_ip.description: Indicates whether to associate a public IP address to the virtual machine.

proxy_url.description: The proxy URL, if using a proxy to connect to the internet.

proxy_user_name.description: The proxy user name, if using a proxy to connect to the internet.

proxy_password.description: The proxy password, if using a proxy to connect to the internet.

proxy_certificates.description: The proxy certificates. A list of certificate file names.

account_id.description: The NetApp account ID that the Connector will be associated with. If not provided, Cloud Manager uses the first account. If no account exists, Cloud Manager creates a new account. You can find the account ID in the account tab of Cloud Manager at [https://cloudmanager.netapp.com](https://cloudmanager.netapp.com).

client_id.description: The client ID of the Cloud Manager Connector. The connector ID. If state is absent, the client id is used to identify the agent and delete it. If state is absent and this parameter is not set, all agents associated with C(name) are deleted. Ignored when state is present.

netapp.cloudmanager.na_cloudmanager_cvo_.short_description: NetApp Cloud Manager CVO for AWS
netapp.cloudmanager.na_cloudmanager_cvo_.description: Create, delete, or manage Cloud Manager CVO for AWS.

state.description: Whether the specified Cloud Manager CVO for AWS should exist or not.

name.description: The name of the Cloud Manager CVO for AWS to manage.

instance_type.description: The instance type to use, which depends on the license type. Explore ['m5.xlarge']. Standard ['m5.2xlarge','r5.xlarge']. Premium ['m5.4xlarge','r5.2xlarge','c4.8xlarge']. For more supported instance types, refer to Cloud Volumes ONTAP Release Notes.

license_type.description: The type of license to use. For single node by Capacity ['capacity-paygo'] For single node by Node paygo ['cot-explore-paygo', 'cot-standard-paygo', 'cot-premium-paygo']. For single node by Node boyl ['cot-premium-byol']. For HA by Capacity ['ha-capacity-paygo'] For HA by Node paygo ['ha-cot-explore-paygo','ha-cot-standard-paygo','ha-cot-premium-paygo']. For HA by Node boyl ['ha-cot-premium-byol'].

provided_license.description: Using a NLF license file for BYOL deployment.

capacity_package_name.description: Capacity package name is required when selecting a capacity based license. Essential only available with Bring Your Own License Capacity-Based. Professional available as an annual contract from AWS marketplace or Bring Your Own License Capacity-Based.

workspace_id.description: The ID of the Cloud Manager workspace where you want to deploy Cloud Volumes ONTAP. If not provided, Cloud Manager uses the first workspace. You can find the ID from the Workspace tab on U(https://cloudmanager.netapp.com).

subnet_id.description: The subnet id where the working environment will be created. Required when single node only.

vpc_id.description: The VPC ID where the working environment will be created. If this argument is not provided, the VPC will be calculated by using the provided subnet ID.

region.description: The region where the working environment will be created.

data_encryption_type.description: The type of encryption to use for the working environment.

client_id.description: The connector ID of the Cloud Manager Connector. You can find the ID from the Connector tab on U(https://cloudmanager.netapp.com).

ebs_volume_size.description: EBS volume size for the first data aggregate. For GB, the value can be [100 or 500]. For TB, the value can be [1,2,4,8,16].

ebs_volume_size_unit.description: The unit for ebs volume size.

ebs_volume_type.description: The EBS volume type for the first data aggregate.

security_group_id.description: The ID of the security group for the working environment. If not provided, Cloud Manager creates the security group.

instance_profile_name.description: The instance profile name for the working environment. If not provided, Cloud Manager creates the instance profile.

svm_password.description: The admin password for Cloud Volumes ONTAP. It will be updated on each run.

ontap_version.description: The required ONTAP version. Ignored if 'use_latest_version' is set to true.

use_latest_version.description: Indicates whether to use the latest available ONTAP version.

platform_serial_number.description: The serial number for the cluster. This is required when using 'cot-premium-byol'.

tier_level.description: The tiering level when 'capacity_tier' is set to 'S3'.

nss_account.description: The NetApp Support Site account ID to use with this Cloud Volumes ONTAP system. If the license type is BYOL and an NSS account is not provided, Cloud Manager tries to use the first existing NSS account.

writing_speed_state.description: The write speed setting for Cloud Volumes ONTAP ['NORMAL','HIGH']. This argument is not relevant for HA pairs.

iops.description: Provisioned IOPS. Required only when provider_volume_type is 'io1' or 'gp3'.

throughput.description: Unit is Mb/s. Valid range 125-1000. Required only when provider_volume_type is 'gp3'.

capacity_tier.description: Whether to enable data tiering for the first data aggregate.

cloud_provider_account.description: The cloud provider credentials id to use when deploying the Cloud Volumes ONTAP system. You can find the ID in Cloud Manager from the Settings > Credentials page. If not specified, Cloud Manager uses the instance profile of the Connector.

backup_volumes_to_cbs.description: Automatically enable back up of all volumes to S3.

enable_compliance.description: Enable the Cloud Compliance service on the working environment.

enable_monitoring.description: Enable the Monitoring service on the working environment.

kms_key_id.description: Aws Encryption parameters. It is required if using aws encryption. Only one of KMS key id or KMS arn should be specified.

kms_key_arn.description: AWS encryption parameters. It is required if using aws encryption. Only one of KMS key id or KMS arn should be specified.

aws_tag.description: Additional tags for the AWS CVO working environment.

is_ha.description: Indicate whether the working environment is an HA pair or not.

platform_serial_number_node1.description: For HA BYOL, the serial number for the first node. This is required when using 'ha-cot-premium-byol'.

platform_serial_number_node2.description: For HA BYOL, the serial number for the second node. This is required when using 'ha-cot-premium-byol'.

node1_subnet_id.description: For HA, the subnet ID of the first node.

node2_subnet_id.description: For HA, the subnet ID of the second node.

mediator_subnet_id.description: For HA, the subnet ID of the mediator.

failover_mode.description: For HA, the failover mode for the HA pair. 'PrivateIP' is for a single availability zone and 'FloatingIP' is for multiple availability zones.

mediator_assign_public_ip.description: Boolean option to assign public IP.

mediator_key_pair_name.description: For HA, the key pair name for the mediator instance.

cluster_floating_ip.description: For HA FloatingIP, the cluster management floating IP address.

data_floating_ip.description: For HA FloatingIP, the data floating IP address.

data_floating_ip2.description: For HA FloatingIP, the data floating IP address.

svm_floating_ip.description: For HA FloatingIP, the SVM management floating IP address.

route_table_ids.description: For HA FloatingIP, the list of route table IDs that will be updated with the floating IPs.

upgrade_ontap_version.description: Indicates whether to upgrade ONTAP image on the CVO. If the current version already matches the desired version, no action is taken.

update_svm_password.description: Indicates whether to update svm_password on the CVO. When set to true, the module is not idempotent, as we cannot read the current password.

netapp.cloudmanager.na_cloudmanager_cvo_.short_description: NetApp Cloud Manager CVO/working environment in single or HA mode for Azure.
netapp.cloudmanager.na_cloudmanager_cvo_.description: Create, delete, or manage Cloud Manager CVO/working environment in single or HA mode for Azure.

state.description: Whether the specified Cloud Manager CVO for AZURE should exist or not.

name.description: The name of the Cloud Manager CVO for AZURE to manage.

subscription_id.description: The ID of the Azure subscription.

instance_type.description: The type of instance to use, which depends on the license type you chose. Explore ['Standard_DS3_v2']. Standard ['Standard_DS4_v2, Standard_DS13_v2, Standard_L8s_v2']. Premium ['Standard_DS5_v2', 'Standard_DS14_v2']. For more supported instance types, refer to Cloud Volumes ONTAP Release Notes.

license_type.description: The type of license to use. For single node by Capacity ['capacity-paygo']. For single node by Node paygo ['azure-cot-explore-paygo', 'azure-cot-standard-paygo', 'azure-cot-premium-paygo']. For single node by Node byol ['azure-cot-premium-byol']. For HA by Capacity ['ha-capacity-paygo']. For HA by Node paygo ['azure-ha-cot-standard-paygo', 'azure-ha-cot-premium-paygo']. For HA by Node byol ['azure-ha-cot-premium-byol'].

provided_license.description: Using a NLF license file for BYOL deployment.

capacity_package_name.description: Capacity package name is required when selecting a capacity based license. Essential only available with Bring Your Own License Capacity-Based. Professional available as an annual contract from a cloud provider or Bring Your Own License Capacity-Based.

workspace_id.description: The ID of the Cloud Manager workspace where you want to deploy Cloud Volumes ONTAP. If not provided, Cloud Manager uses the first workspace. You can find the ID from the Workspace tab on [https://cloudmanager.netapp.com].

subnet_id.description: The name of the subnet for the Cloud Volumes ONTAP system.

vnet_id.description: The name of the virtual network.

vnet_resource_group.description: The resource group in Azure associated to the virtual network.

resource_group.description: The resource_group where Cloud Volumes ONTAP will be created. If not provided, Cloud Manager generates the resource group name (name of the working environment/CVO with suffix '-rg'). If the resource group does not exist, it is created.

allow_deploy_in_existing_rg.description: Indicates if to allow creation in existing resource group.

cidr.description: The CIDR of the VNET. If not provided, resource needs az login to authorize and fetch the cidr details from Azure.

location.description: The location where the working environment will be created.

data_encryption_type.description: The type of encryption to use for the working environment.

azure_encryption_parameters.description: AZURE encryption parameters. It is required if using AZURE encryption.

storage_type.description: The type of storage for the first data aggregate.

client_id.description: The connector ID of the Cloud Manager Connector. You can find the ID from the Connector tab on [https://cloudmanager.netapp.com].

disk_size.description: Azure volume size for the first data aggregate. For GB, the value can be [100, 500]. For TB, the value can be [1,2,4,8,16].

security_group_id.description: The ID of the security group for the working environment. If not provided, Cloud Manager creates the security group.

svm_password.description: The admin password for Cloud Volumes ONTAP. It will be updated on each run.

ontap_version.description: The required ONTAP version. Ignored if 'use_latest_version' is set to true.

use_latest_version.description: Indicates whether to use the latest available ONTAP version.

serial_number.description: The serial number for the cluster. Required when using one of these, 'azure-cot-premium-byol' or 'azure-ha-cot-premium-byol'.

tier_level.description: If capacity_tier is Blob, this argument indicates the tiering level.

nss_account.description: The NetApp Support Site account ID to use with this Cloud Volumes ONTAP system. If the license type is BYOL and an NSS account isn't provided, Cloud Manager tries to use the first existing NSS account.

writing_speed_state.description: The write speed setting for Cloud Volumes ONTAP ['NORMAL','HIGH']. This argument is not relevant for HA pairs.

capacity_tier.description: Whether to enable data tiering for the first data aggregate.

cloud_provider_account.description: The cloud provider credentials id to use when deploying the Cloud Volumes ONTAP system. You can find the ID in Cloud Manager from the Settings > Credentials page. If not specified, Cloud Manager uses the instance profile of the Connector.

backup_volumes_to_cbs.description: Automatically enable back up of all volumes to S3.

enable_compliance.description: Enable the Cloud Compliance service on the working environment.

enable_monitoring.description: Enable the Monitoring service on the working environment.

azure_tag.description: Additional tags for the AZURE CVO working environment.

is_ha.description: Indicate whether the working environment is an HA pair or not.

platform_serial_number_node1.description: For HA BYOL, the serial number for the first node.

platform_serial_number_node2.description: For HA BYOL, the serial number for the second node.

ha_enable_https.description: For HA, enable the HTTPS connection from CVO to storage accounts. This can impact write performance. The default is false.

upgrade_ontap_version.description: Indicates whether to upgrade ONTAP image on the CVO. If the current version already matches the desired version, no action is taken.

update_svm_password.description: Indicates whether to update svm_password on the CVO. When set to true, the module is not idempotent, as we cannot read the current password.

availability_zone.description: The availability zone on the location configuration.

availability_zone_node1.description: The node1 availability zone on the location configuration for HA.

availability_zone_node2.description: The node2 availability zone on the location configuration for HA.

netapp.cloudmanager.na_cloudmanager_cvo_.short_description: NetApp Cloud Manager CVO for GCP
netapp.cloudmanager.na_cloudmanager_cvo_.description: Create, delete, or manage Cloud Manager CVO for GCP.

backup_volumes_to_cbs.description: Automatically backup all volumes to cloud.

capacity_tier.description: Whether to enable data tiering for the first data aggregate.

client_id.description: The connector ID of the Cloud Manager Connector. You can find the ID from the Connector tab on U(https://cloudmanager.netapp.com).

data_encryption_type.description: Type of encryption to use for this working environment.

enable_compliance.description: Enable the Cloud Compliance service on the working environment.

firewall_rule.description: Firewall name for a single node cluster.

gcp_labels.description: Optionally provide up to four key-value pairs with which to all GCP entities created by Cloud Manager.

gcp_service_account.description: The gcp_service_account email in order to enable tiering of cold data to Google Cloud Storage.

instance_type.description: The type of instance to use, which depends on the license type you choose. Explore ['custom-4-16384']. Standard ['n1-standard-8']. Premium ['n1-standard-32']. BYOL all instance types defined for PayGo. For more supported instance types, refer to Cloud Volumes ONTAP Release Notes.

is_ha.description: Indicate whether the working environment is an HA pair or not.

license_type.description: The type of license to use. For single node by Capacity ['capacity-paygo']. For single node by Node paygo ['gcp-cot-explore-paygo', 'gcp-cot-standard-paygo', 'gcp-cot-premium-paygo']. For single node by Node byol ['gcp-cot-premium-byol']. For HA by Capacity ['ha-capacity-paygo']. For HA by Node paygo ['gcp-ha-cot-explore-paygo', 'gcp-ha-cot-standard-paygo', 'gcp-ha-cot-premium-paygo']. For HA by Node byol ['gcp-cot-premium-byol'].

provided_license.description: Using a NLF license file for BYOL deployment

capacity_package_name.description: Capacity package name is required when selecting a capacity based license.

mediator_zone.description: The zone for mediator. Option for HA pair only.

name.description: The name of the Cloud Manager CVO for GCP to manage.

network_project_id.description: The project id in GCP associated with the Subnet. If not provided, it is assumed that the Subnet is within the previously specified project id.

node1_zone.description: Zone for node 1. Option for HA pair only.

node2_zone.description: Zone for node 2. Option for HA pair only.

nss_account.description: The NetApp Support Site account ID to use with this Cloud Volumes ONTAP system. If the license type is BYOL and an NSS account isn't provided, Cloud Manager tries to use the first existing NSS account.

ontap_version.description: The required ONTAP version. Ignored if 'use_latest_version' is set to true.

platform_serial_number_node1.description: For HA BYOL, the serial number for the first node. Option for HA pair only.

platform_serial_number_node2.description: For HA BYOL, the serial number for the second node. Option for HA pair only.

project_id.description: The ID of the GCP project.

platform_serial_number.description: The serial number for the system. Required when using 'gcp-cot-premium-byol'.

state.description: Whether the specified Cloud Manager CVO for GCP should exist or not.

subnet_id.description: The name of the subnet for Cloud Volumes ONTAP.

subnet0_node_and_data_connectivity.description: Subnet path for nic1, required for node and data connectivity. If using shared VPC, network_project_id must be provided. Option for HA pair only.

subnet1_cluster_connectivity.description: Subnet path for nic2, required for cluster connectivity. Option for HA pair only.

subnet2_ha_connectivity.description: Subnet path for nic3, required for HA connectivity. Option for HA pair only.

subnet3_data_replication.description: Subnet path for nic4, required for HA connectivity. Option for HA pair only.

svm_password.description: The admin password for Cloud Volumes ONTAP. It will be updated on each run.

tier_level.description: The tiering level when 'capacity_tier' is set to 'cloudStorage'.

use_latest_version.description: Indicates whether to use the latest available ONTAP version.

vpc0_firewall_rule_name.description: Firewall rule name for vpc1. Option for HA pair only.

vpc0_node_and_data_connectivity.description: VPC path for nic1, required for node and data connectivity. If using shared VPC, network_project_id must be provided. Option for HA pair only.

vpc1_cluster_connectivity.description: VPC path for nic2, required for cluster connectivity. Option for HA pair only.

vpc1_firewall_rule_name.description: Firewall rule name for vpc2. Option for HA pair only.

vpc2_ha_connectivity.description: VPC path for nic3, required for HA connectivity. Option for HA pair only.

vpc2_firewall_rule_name.description: Firewall rule name for vpc3. Option for HA pair only.

vpc3_data_replication.description: VPC path for nic4, required for data replication. Option for HA pair only.

vpc3_firewall_rule_name.description: Firewall rule name for vpc4. Option for HA pair only.

workspace_id.description: The ID of the Cloud Manager workspace where you want to deploy Cloud Volumes ONTAP. If not provided, Cloud Manager uses the first workspace. You can find the ID from the Workspace tab on [https://cloudmanager.netapp.com].

writing_speed_state.description: The write speed setting for Cloud Volumes ONTAP ['NORMAL','HIGH']. Default value is 'NORMAL' for non-HA GCP CVO This argument is not relevant for HA pairs.

zone.description: The zone of the region where the working environment will be created.

upgrade_ontap_version.description: Indicates whether to upgrade ONTAP image on the CVO. If the current version already matches the desired version, no action is taken.

update_svm_password.description: Indicates whether to update svm_password on the CVO. When set to true, the module is not idempotent, as we cannot read the current password.

subnet_path.description: Subnet path for a single node cluster.

netapp.cloudmanager.na_cloudmanager_info.description: This module allows you to gather various information about cloudmanager using REST APIs.

client_id.description: The connector ID of the Cloud Manager Connector.

gather_subsets.description: When supplied, this argument will restrict the information collected to a given subset. Possible values for this argument include working_environments_info aggregates_info accounts_info account_info agents_info active_agents_info

state.description: Whether the specified nss account should exist or not.

client_id.description: The connector ID of the Cloud Manager Connector.

public_id.description: The ID of the NSS account.

name.description: The name of the NSS account.

netapp.cloudmanager.na_cloudmanager_snap.description: Create or Delete SnapMirror relationship on Cloud Manager.

state.description: Whether the specified snapmirror relationship should exist or not.

source_working_environment_name.description: The working environment name of the source volume.

destination_working_environment_name.description: The working environment name of the destination volume.

source_working_environment_id.description: The public ID of the working environment of the source volume.

destination_working_environment_id.description: The public ID of the working environment of the destination volume.

destination_aggregate_name.description: The aggregate in which the volume will be created. If not provided, Cloud Manager chooses the best aggregate for you.

max_transfer_rate.description: Maximum transfer rate limit KB/s. Use 0 for no limit, otherwise use number between 1024 and 2,147,482,624.

source_svm_name.description: The name of the source SVM. The default SVM name is used, if a name is not provided.

destination_svm_name.description: The name of the destination SVM. The default SVM name is used, if a name is not provided.

source_volume_name.description: The name of the source volume.

destination_volume_name.description: The name of the destination volume to be created for snapmirror relationship.

provider_volume_type.description: The underlying cloud provider volume type. For AWS ['gp3', 'gp2', 'io1', 'st1', 'sc1']. For Azure ['Premium_LRS','Standard_LRS','StandardSSD_LRS']. For GCP ['pd-balanced','pd-ssd','pd-standard'].

capacity_tier.description: The volume capacity tier for tiering cold data to object storage. The default values for each cloud provider are as follows, Amazon 'S3', Azure 'Blob', GCP 'cloudStorage'. If NONE, the capacity tier will not be set on volume creation.

tenant_id.description: The NetApp account ID that the Connector will be associated with. To be used only when using FSx.

client_id.description: The connector ID of the Cloud Manager Connector.

netapp.cloudmanager.na_cloudmanager_volu.description: Create, Modify or Delete volume on Cloud Manager.

state.description: Whether the specified volume should exist or not.

working_environment_name.description: The working environment name where the volume will be created.

working_environment_id.description: The public ID of the working environment where the volume will be created.

client_id.description: The connector ID of the Cloud Manager Connector.

provider_volume_type.description: The underlying cloud provider volume type. For AWS is ["gp3", "gp2", "io1", "st1", "sc1"]. For Azure is ['Premium_LRS','Standard_LRS','StandardSSD_LRS']. For GCP is ['pd-balanced','pd-ssd','pd-standard'].

enable_deduplication.description: Enabling deduplication. Default to true if not specified.

enable_compression.description: Enabling cpmpression. Default to true if not specified.

enable_thin_provisioning.description: Enabling thin provisioning. Default to true if not specified.

svm_name.description: The name of the SVM. The default SVM name is used, if a name is not provided.

aggregate_name.description: The aggregate in which the volume will be created. If not provided, Cloud Manager chooses the best aggregate.

capacity_tier.description: The volume's capacity tier for tiering cold data to object storage. The default values for each cloud provider are as follows. Amazon as 'S3', Azure as 'Blob', GCP as 'cloudStorage'. If 'NONE', the capacity tier will not be set on volume creation.

export_policy_type.description: The export policy type (NFS protocol parameters).

export_policy_ip.description: Custom export policy list of IPs (NFS protocol parameters).

iops.description: Provisioned IOPS. Needed only when provider_volume_type is "io1".

throughput.description: Unit is Mb/s. Valid range 125-1000. Required only when provider_volume_type is 'gp3'.

volume_protocol.description: The protocol for the volume. This affects the provided parameters.

permission.description: CIFS share permission type (CIFS protocol parameters).

users.description: List of users with the permission (CIFS protocol parameters).

tenant_id.description: The NetApp account ID that the Connector will be associated with. To be used only when using FSx.

initiators.description: Set of attributes of Initiators (iSCSI protocol parameters).
